topic: VP Duterte's 'bloodied but unbowed' framing vs. her refusal to attend trial
tweet1: VP Sara Duterte called her impeachment trial a 'bloodbath' where she'll be 'bloodied but unbowed' — then refused to attend despite being at the Senate.
tweet2: Her lawyer Michael Poa confirmed she met her defense team sa Senate grounds this morning pero hindi pumunta sa actual trial. She showed up para sa strategy meeting, not the proceedings.
tweet3: Meanwhile yung 'green box' ng tax records niya dumating na sa BIR today. Kaya pala ayaw pumasok — the documentary evidence is coming in faster than she can control the narrative.
tweet4: She's framing this as martyrdom pero ang actual move is classic pre-emptive damage control. Watch: she'll claim persecution loudest on days the evidence hits hardest.
